drupalNodeEvent.title: CHERN Book Launch | Narrating China and Europe in Uncertain Times

field_speakers.processed: Ágota Révész, Daniela Caterina, Jelena Gledic, Magnus Feldmann & Steven Langendonk, Bart Dessein, Jasper Roctus & Duncan Freeman

field_description.processed:
Book Launch | Narrating China and Europe in Uncertain Times

As geopolitical tensions rise, narratives have become more important than ever.
WG4 of CHERN (“Public Diplomacy and Knowledge Production”) is delighted to invite you to the online launch of:

Narrating China and Europe in Uncertain Times
Révész, Á., Freeman, D., Feldmann, M. & Langendonk, S. (eds.)
Bristol University Press, 2025

Date and time: 15 December (Monday), 17:00–18:00 CET
Online:  Register here: https://vu-live.zoom.us/meeting/register/gD1FhapyTzi4tqvK5__D_A

Program
• Introduction to the volume — Ágota Révész
• Roundtable on European narratives — Daniela Caterina, Jelena Gledic, Magnus Feldmann & Steven Langendonk
• Chapter spotlights on Chinese narratives — Bart Dessein, Jasper Roctus & Duncan Freeman
• Q&A with plenty of space for exchange

We look forward to seeing many of you there!
